name: Parallels Desktop
description: Virtualization software for running Windows and other OS on Mac

extraction.note: JSON catalog contains indirect redirect links. Follow DMG redirect to get versioned URL, then extract version.

changelog.note: Blog post per major version, not structured changelog

release_date.url: blog post for the major version
release_date.note: KB article 124223 (system requirements) has a 'Last Review' date

notes: Cloudflare-protected website. Old update.parallels.com XML feeds all return 404. Major version now matches macOS version (e.g., PD 26 for macOS 26 Tahoe). No Sparkle feed — uses proprietary update mechanism. Auth/entitlement required for full version (trial available). Download links require ?experience=enter_key parameter.
